description: Stores branch information for the bank.

columns.name: branch_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a bank branch.

columns.name: branch_name
columns.description: The name of the bank branch.

columns.name: city
columns.description: The city where the branch is located.

description: Stores relationship manager information. A relationship manager manages customer accounts.

columns.name: rm_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a relationship manager.

columns.name: rm_name
columns.description: The full name of the relationship manager.

columns.name: branch_id
columns.description: The branch where the relationship manager works.

columns.name: customer_name
columns.description: The full name of the customer.

columns.name: branch_id
columns.description: The branch assigned to the customer.

columns.name: rm_id
columns.description: The relationship manager assigned to the customer.

description: Stores deposit account information for customers.

columns.name: deposit_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a deposit record.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: The customer who owns this deposit.

columns.name: deposit_amount
columns.description: The amount of money deposited by the customer.

columns.name: deposit_type
columns.description: The type of deposit account, such as savings, checking, or time_deposit.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: The timestamp when the deposit record was last updated.
